✦ the plan

twenty days

Nothing's pinned to a date. We'll decide each day by mood. Drag a city, a place, or one of our picks onto any day, then rearrange to taste. It saves on this phone, just for us.

✦ UK in July: daylight stretches past 10pm and the days are mild rather than hot, but rain blows through fast, so pack layers and something waterproof.
